final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original surrealist dreamscape illustration featuring a colossal moon rising from the ocean, whales soaring through the sky, melting clocks, and a staircase ascending into the clouds.

Style/medium: surrealist oil painting in the tradition of Salvador Dalí and René Magritte, painterly textures with photorealistic rendering of impossible scenes
Composition: wide panoramic view, horizon line at lower third, layered vertical depth from ocean surface up through sky to cloud-level staircase, multiple focal points drawing the eye upward
Subject: a massive luminous moon emerging from a calm ocean surface; humpback whales gliding weightlessly through open sky; melting pocket watches draped over rocky ledges; a grand stone staircase spiraling upward into dense cumulus clouds
Scene/backdrop: vast open ocean at twilight, still reflective water below, infinite sky above filled with soft volumetric clouds and scattered stars at the upper edge
Lighting/mood: ethereal cool moonlight as primary source casting long silver reflections on water, warm amber glow emanating from within the moon's core, deeply philosophical and quietly unsettling atmosphere
Color palette: deep indigo and midnight blue as dominant tones, silver-white moonlight as structural highlight, muted warm amber as counterpoint accent, desaturated stone grey for the staircase
Materials/textures: smooth glass-like ocean surface with subtle ripple reflections, rough-hewn stone steps with moss, soft rubbery melting clock faces, whale skin with natural matte sheen
Avoid: cartoon style, flat illustration, neon colors, cheerful tone, generic fantasy clichés, watermark, stuffer quality words
